历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 21404 → 27554 → 19193 → 44146. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination subject grouping, the ranking significantly shifted backward (the group with no subject restrictions had the largest ranking). The fluctuation has been severe in the past three years, with a baseline of about 44146 in 2025. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 76 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 74 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 85, an increase of about 14.9% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 71st, with a steady rise from 83rd in recent years, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2025, its reputation was somewhat negative (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%, attracting attention). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, with a rating of 'average' and moderate short video exposure. There is no clear signal of a major enrollment gap for Yunnan University in Sichuan in historical admission anomaly records. It has A+ in Ethnology, A in Ecology, and A- in Statistics. Among these, Ecology is directly related to the university's science enrollment majors (Ecology Elite Class, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc.), and Statistics is related to Data Science, Big Data, and other majors, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 462,767 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 329,239, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant ranking shift backward in 2025, the positive factor of an approximately 14.9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from an approximately 15.6% increase in provincial examinees, the steady rise in school ranking but negative reputation, the expansion and increase in examinees roughly offset each other. The ranking is expected to shift slightly backward near the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 48133, with a range of 47633 to 48633.
